489:     `PY`;

491:   if (extract.exitCode !== 0) {
492:     const combined = [extract.stdout, extract.stderr].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
493:     throw new Error(combined || 'Failed to restore dependency cache archive');
494:   }
495: }

497: async function resolveRollbackContext(workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string, enabled: boolean, env: Env): Promise<unknown> {
498:   if (!enabled) {
499:     return { status: 'disabled' };
500:   }
501:   const previous = await getLatestSuccessfulWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId);
502:   if (!previous || previous.id === deploymentId) {
503:     return { status: 'no_previous_success' };
504:   }
505:   return {
506:     status: 'retained_previous',
507:     deploymentId: previous.id,
508:     deployedUrl: previous.deployedUrl,
509:     providerDeploymentId: previous.providerDeploymentId,
510:   };
511: }

529: async function reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(
530:   env: Env,
531:   workspaceId: string,

533: ): Promise<void> {
534:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
535:   if (!deployment) {
536:     return;
537:   }
538: 
539:   if (deployment.status === 'succeeded') {
540:     const hasSucceededEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
541:       env.DB,
542:       workspaceId,
543:       deploymentId,
544:       'deployment_succeeded'
545:     );
546:     if (!hasSucceededEvent) {
547:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
548:         workspaceId,
549:         deploymentId,
550:         eventType: 'deployment_succeeded',
551:         payload: {
552:           deployedUrl: deployment.deployedUrl,
553:           sourceBundleKey: deployment.sourceBundleKey,
554:           sourceSnapshotSha256: deployment.sourceSnapshotSha256,
555:         },
556:       });
557:     }
558: 
559:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
560:       deploymentId: deployment.id,
561:       status: 'succeeded',
562:       deployedUrl: deployment.deployedUrl,
563:       deployedAt: deployment.finishedAt,
564:       errorCode: null,
565:       errorMessage: null,
566:     });
567:     return;
568:   }
569: 
570:   if (deployment.status === 'failed') {
571:     const hasFailedEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'deployment_failed');
572:     if (!hasFailedEvent) {
573:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
574:         workspaceId,
575:         deploymentId,
576:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
577:         payload: {
578:           code: deployment.error?.code ?? 'deployment_failed',
579:           message: deployment.error?.message ?? 'Deployment failed',
580:         },
581:       });
582:     }
583: 
584:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
585:       deploymentId: deployment.id,
586:       status: 'failed',
587:       errorCode: deployment.error?.code ?? null,
588:       errorMessage: deployment.error?.message ?? null,
589:     });
590:     return;
591:   }
592: 
593:   if (deployment.status === 'cancelled') {
594:     const hasCancelledEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
595:       env.DB,
596:       workspaceId,
597:       deploymentId,
598:       'deployment_cancelled'
599:     );
600:     if (!hasCancelledEvent) {
601:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
602:         workspaceId,
603:         deploymentId,
604:         eventType: 'deployment_cancelled',
605:         payload: { reason: 'cancel_requested' },
606:       });
607:     }
608: 
609:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
610:       deploymentId: deployment.id,
611:       status: 'cancelled',
612:       errorCode: null,
613:       errorMessage: null,
614:     });
615:   }

644: function isRunningDeploymentStale(startedAt: string | null): boolean {
645:   if (!startedAt) {
646:     return false;
647:   }
648: 
649:   const startedAtEpochMs = Date.parse(startedAt);
650:   if (!Number.isFinite(startedAtEpochMs)) {
651:     return false;
652:   }
653: 
654:   return Date.now() - startedAtEpochMs >= STALE_RUNNING_TIMEOUT_MS;
655: }

664: async function executeWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
665:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
666:   if (!deployment) {
667:     return;
668:   }
669:   const payload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
670:   if (!payload) {
671:     throw new PolicyError('deployment_not_found', 'Deployment payload no longer exists');
672:   }
673: 
674:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
675:   if (!workspace || workspace.status !== 'ready') {
676:     throw new PolicyError('workspace_not_ready', 'Workspace is not ready for deployment');
677:   }
678: 
679:   const validation =
680:     payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
681:       ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
682:       : {};
683:   const autoFix =
684:     payload.autoFix && typeof payload.autoFix === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.autoFix)
685:       ? (payload.autoFix as Record<string, unknown>)
686:       : {};
687:   const cache =
688:     payload.cache && typeof payload.cache === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.cache)
689:       ? (payload.cache as Record<string, unknown>)
690:       : {};
691:   const requestedToolchain =
692:     payload.toolchain && typeof payload.toolchain === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.toolchain)
693:       ? (payload.toolchain as Record<string, unknown>)
694:       : null;
695:   const deploy =
696:     payload.deploy && typeof payload.deploy === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.deploy)
697:       ? (payload.deploy as Record<string, unknown>)
698:       : {};
699:   const validationOptions: DeploymentValidationOptions = {
700:     runBuildIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runBuildIfPresent, true),
701:     runTestsIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runTestsIfPresent, true),
702:   };
703:   const autoFixOptions: DeploymentAutoFixOptions = {
704:     rehydrateBaseline: parseBoolean(autoFix.rehydrateBaseline, false),
705:     bootstrapToolchain: parseBoolean(autoFix.bootstrapToolchain, false),
706:   };
707:   const cacheOptions: DeploymentCacheOptions = {
708:     dependencyCache: parseBoolean(cache.dependencyCache, true),
709:   };
710:   const publishOptions: DeploymentPublishOptions = {
711:     provider: getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(payload.provider, env),
712:     outputDir: parseString(deploy.outputDir),
713:   };
714:   const { runBuildIfPresent, runTestsIfPresent } = validationOptions;
715:   const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(payload.rollbackOnFailure, true);
716:   const remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[] = [];
717:   const workspaceProjectRootRaw =
718:     typeof workspace.sourceProjectRoot === 'string' && workspace.sourceProjectRoot.trim() ? workspace.sourceProjectRoot : '.';
719:   let workspaceProjectRoot = '.';
720:   try {
721:     workspaceProjectRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(workspaceProjectRootRaw);
722:   } catch (error) {
723:     throw new PolicyError('invalid_project_root', error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
724:   }
725: 
726:   if (publishOptions.provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && !publishOptions.outputDir) {
727:     throw new PolicyError(
728:       'provider_invalid_output_dir',
729:       'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider'
730:     );
731:   }
732: 
733:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, workspace.sandboxId);
734:   try {
735:     await ensureWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
736:   } catch (error) {
737:     if (!(error instanceof PolicyError) || error.code !== 'baseline_missing') {
738:       throw error;
739:     }
740: 
741:     if (!autoFixOptions.rehydrateBaseline) {
742:       throw error;
743:     }
744: 
745:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
746:       workspaceId,
747:       deploymentId,
748:       eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_attempted',
749:       payload: {},
750:     });
751: 
752:     const rehydrated = await tryRehydrateWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
753:     if (!rehydrated) {
754:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
755:         workspaceId,
756:         deploymentId,
757:         eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_failed',
758:         payload: {},
759:       });
760:       throw new PolicyError('baseline_rehydrate_failed', 'Workspace git baseline is missing and could not be rehydrated');
761:     }
762: 
763:     remediations.push({ code: 'baseline_rehydrated', applied: true });
764:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
765:       workspaceId,
766:       deploymentId,
767:       eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_succeeded',
768:       payload: {},
769:     });
770:   }
771: 
772:   const provenance =
773:     payload.provenance && typeof payload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.provenance)
774:       ? (payload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
775:       : {};
776:   const taskId = typeof provenance.taskId === 'string' ? provenance.taskId : null;
777:   const operationId = typeof provenance.operationId === 'string' ? provenance.operationId : null;
778:   if (taskId) {
779:     const task = await getWorkspaceTask(env.DB, workspaceId, taskId);
780:     if (!task) {
781:       throw new PolicyError('invalid_provenance_task', 'Referenced taskId does not belong to workspace');
782:     }
783:   }
784:   if (operationId) {
785:     const operation = await getWorkspaceOperation(env.DB, workspaceId, operationId);
786:     if (!operation) {
787:       throw new PolicyError('invalid_provenance_operation', 'Referenced operationId does not belong to workspace');
788:     }
789:   }
790: 
791:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
792:     workspaceId,
793:     deploymentId,
794:     eventType: 'deployment_started',
795:     payload: {
796:       provider: deployment.provider,
797:       attemptCount: deployment.attemptCount,
798:       runBuildIfPresent,
799:       runTestsIfPresent,
800:       autoFix: autoFixOptions,
801:       cache: cacheOptions,
802:     },
803:   });
804: 
805:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
806: 
807:   let provider;
808:   try {
809:     provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(publishOptions.provider, env);
810:     const providerChecks = await provider.precheck();
811:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
812:       workspaceId,
813:       deploymentId,
814:       eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck',
815:       payload: {
816:         provider: publishOptions.provider,
817:         checks: providerChecks,
818:       },
819:     });
820:     const failedCheck = providerChecks.find((check) => !check.ok);
821:     if (failedCheck) {
822:       throw new PolicyError(failedCheck.code, failedCheck.details ?? 'Provider precheck failed');
823:     }
824:   } catch (error) {
825:     const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
826:     if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
827:       throw new QueueRetryError('Provider create deployment request is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
828:     }
829:     throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
830:   }
831: 
832:   let toolchain: WorkspaceToolchainProfile;
833:   try {
834:     toolchain = applyRequestedToolchainOverride(
835:       await detectWorkspaceToolchainProfile(
836:         sandbox,
837:         workspaceProjectRoot
838:       ),
839:       requestedToolchain
840:     );
841:   } catch (error) {
842:     throw new PolicyError('toolchain_detect_failed', error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
843:   }
844: 
845:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
846:     workspaceId,
847:     deploymentId,
848:     eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_detected',
849:     payload: toolchain,
850:   });
851: 
852:   if (toolchain.manager === 'unknown') {
853:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
854:       workspaceId,
855:       deploymentId,
856:       eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_unknown_fallback',
857:       payload: { fallbackManager: 'npm' },
858:     });
859:   }
860: 
861:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {
862:     workspaceId,
863:     toolchain,
864:     remediations,
865:   });
866: 
867:   const scripts = await detectPackageScriptsInProjectRoot(sandbox, workspaceProjectRoot);
868:   const shouldBootstrapForValidation =
869:     (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest) || (runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild);
870: 
871:   if (autoFixOptions.bootstrapToolchain && shouldBootstrapForValidation) {
872:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
873:       workspaceId,
874:       deploymentId,
875:       eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_started',
876:       payload: {
877:         manager: toolchain.manager,
878:         version: toolchain.version,
879:       },
880:     });
881:     try {
882:       await bootstrapToolchainIfNeeded(sandbox, toolchain);
883:       if (toolchain.manager === 'pnpm' || toolchain.manager === 'yarn') {
884:         remediations.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrapped', applied: true });
885:       }
886:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
887:         workspaceId,
888:         deploymentId,
889:         eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_succeeded',
890:         payload: { manager: toolchain.manager },
891:       });
892:     } catch (error) {
893:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
894:         workspaceId,
895:         deploymentId,
896:         eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_failed',
897:         payload: {
898:           manager: toolchain.manager,
899:           message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
900:         },
901:       });
902:       throw error;
903:     }
904:   } else {
905:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
906:       workspaceId,
907:       deploymentId,
908:       eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_succeeded',
909:       payload: { manager: toolchain.manager, skipped: true },
910:     });
911:   }
912:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
913: 
914:   const potentialSecrets = await detectPotentialSecrets(sandbox);
915:   if (potentialSecrets.length > 0) {
916:     throw new PolicyError(
917:       'potential_secrets_detected',
918:       `Potential secrets detected in workspace files: ${potentialSecrets.join(', ')}`
919:     );
920:   }
921: 
922:   const dependencyCacheKey = cacheOptions.dependencyCache ? await makeDependencyCacheKey(workspaceId, toolchain) : null;
923:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {
924:     workspaceId,
925:     toolchain,
926:     dependencyCacheKey,
927:     dependencyCacheHit: false,
928:     remediations,
929:   });
930: 
931:   if (cacheOptions.dependencyCache && dependencyCacheKey) {
932:     const existingCache = await getWorkspaceDependencyCache(env.DB, workspaceId, dependencyCacheKey);
933:     if (!existingCache) {
934:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
935:         workspaceId,
936:         deploymentId,
937:         eventType: 'deployment_dependency_cache_miss',
938:         payload: { dependencyCacheKey },
939:       });
940:     } else {
941:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
942:         workspaceId,
943:         deploymentId,
944:         eventType: 'deployment_dependency_cache_hit',
945:         payload: { dependencyCacheKey, artifactKey: existingCache.artifactKey },
946:       });
947:       try {
948:         const bucket = env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ?? env.SOURCE_BUNDLES;
949:         const object = bucket ? await bucket.get(existingCache.artifactKey) : null;
950:         if (!object) {
951:           throw new Error('Dependency cache artifact is unavailable');
952:         }
953:         const bytes = new Uint8Array(await object.arrayBuffer());
954:         const artifactSha256 = await sha256Hex(bytes);
955:         if (artifactSha256 !== existingCache.artifactSha256) {
956:           throw new Error('Dependency cache integrity check failed: sha256 mismatch');
957:         }
958:         await restoreDependencyCacheArchive(sandbox, toolchain, bytes);
959:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {
960:           workspaceId,
961:           dependencyCacheHit: true,
962:         });
963:       } catch (error) {
964:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
965:           workspaceId,
966:           deploymentId,
967:           eventType: 'deployment_dependency_cache_restore_failed',
968:           payload: {
969:             dependencyCacheKey,
970:             message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
971:           },
972:         });
973:       }
974:     }
975:   }
976: 
977:   if (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest) {
978:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
979:       workspaceId,
980:       deploymentId,
981:       eventType: 'validation_started',
982:       payload: { step: 'test' },
983:     });
984:     try {
985:       await runValidationStep(
986:         sandbox,
987:         `cd ${shellQuote(workspaceProjectRoot === '.' ? WORKSPACE_ROOT : `${WORKSPACE_ROOT}/${workspaceProjectRoot}`)} && ${managerRunScriptCommand(toolchain, 'test')}`,
988:         10 * 60 * 1000,
989:         'validation_tool_missing'
990:       );
991:     } catch (error) {
992:       if (error instanceof PolicyError && error.code === 'validation_tool_missing') {
993:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
994:           workspaceId,
995:           deploymentId,
996:           eventType: 'deployment_validation_tool_missing',
997:           payload: { step: 'test', message: error.message },
998:         });
999:       }
1000:       throw error;
1001:     }
1002:     await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1003:   }
1004:   if (runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild) {
1005:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1006:       workspaceId,
1007:       deploymentId,
1008:       eventType: 'validation_started',
1009:       payload: { step: 'build' },
1010:     });
1011:     try {
1012:       await runValidationStep(
1013:         sandbox,
1014:         `cd ${shellQuote(workspaceProjectRoot === '.' ? WORKSPACE_ROOT : `${WORKSPACE_ROOT}/${workspaceProjectRoot}`)} && ${managerRunScriptCommand(toolchain, 'build')}`,
1015:         10 * 60 * 1000,
1016:         'validation_tool_missing'
1017:       );
1018:     } catch (error) {
1019:       if (error instanceof PolicyError && error.code === 'validation_tool_missing') {
1020:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1021:           workspaceId,
1022:           deploymentId,
1023:           eventType: 'deployment_validation_tool_missing',
1024:           payload: { step: 'build', message: error.message },
1025:         });
1026:       }
1027:       throw error;
1028:     }
1029:     await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1030:   }
1031: 
1032:   if (cacheOptions.dependencyCache && dependencyCacheKey) {
1033:     const archive = await createDependencyCacheArchive(sandbox, toolchain);
1034:     if (archive) {
1035:       const bucket = env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ?? env.SOURCE_BUNDLES;
1036:       if (bucket) {
1037:         const artifactKey = `workspaces/${workspaceId}/dependency-caches/${dependencyCacheKey}.tar.gz`;
1038:         await bucket.put(artifactKey, archive.bytes, {
1039:           httpMetadata: { contentType: 'application/gzip' },
1040:           customMetadata: {
1041:             workspace_id: workspaceId,
1042:             cache_key: dependencyCacheKey,
1043:             manager: toolchain.manager,
1044:           },
1045:         });
1046:         await upsertWorkspaceDependencyCache(env.DB, {
1047:           id: `wdc_${dependencyCacheKey.slice(0, 24)}`,
1048:           workspaceId,
1049:           cacheKey: dependencyCacheKey,
1050:           manager: toolchain.manager,
1051:           managerVersion: toolchain.version,
1052:           projectRoot: toolchain.projectRoot,
1053:           lockfileName: toolchain.lockfile?.name ?? null,
1054:           lockfileSha256: toolchain.lockfile?.sha256 ?? null,
1055:           artifactKey,
1056:           artifactSha256: archive.sha256,
1057:           artifactBytes: archive.bytes.byteLength,
1058:         });
1059:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1060:           workspaceId,
1061:           deploymentId,
1062:           eventType: 'deployment_dependency_cache_saved',
1063:           payload: {
1064:             dependencyCacheKey,
1065:             artifactKey,
1066:             artifactBytes: archive.bytes.byteLength,
1067:           },
1068:         });
1069:       }
1070:     }
1071:   }
1072: 
1073:   const sourceBundle = await createDeploymentBundle(sandbox);
1074:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1075:   const bucket = env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ?? env.SOURCE_BUNDLES;
1076:   if (!bucket) {
1077:     throw new Error('No artifact bucket is configured for workspace deployment');
1078:   }
1079: 
1080:   const sourceBundleKey = `workspaces/${workspaceId}/deployments/${deploymentId}/${sourceBundle.objectKeySuffix}`;
1081:   await bucket.put(sourceBundleKey, sourceBundle.bytes, {
1082:     httpMetadata: {
1083:       contentType: 'application/gzip',
1084:     },
1085:     customMetadata: {
1086:       workspace_id: workspaceId,
1087:       deployment_id: deploymentId,
1088:       source_snapshot_sha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1089:     },
1090:   });
1091:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1092: 
1093:   let outputBundle = sourceBundle;
1094:   let publishOutputDir = workspaceProjectRoot;
1095:   if (publishOptions.provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
1096:     const relativeOutputDir = publishOptions.outputDir;
1097:     if (!relativeOutputDir) {
1098:       throw new PolicyError('provider_invalid_output_dir', 'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider');
1099:     }
1100:     publishOutputDir =
1101:       workspaceProjectRoot === '.'
1102:         ? normalizeProjectRoot(relativeOutputDir)
1103:         : normalizeProjectRoot(`${workspaceProjectRoot}/${relativeOutputDir}`);
1104:     outputBundle = await createOutputBundle(sandbox, publishOutputDir);
1105:   }
1106: 
1107:   let createResult: {
1108:     providerDeploymentId: string;
1109:     status: 'queued' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'cancelled';

1792:   env: Env,
1793:   workspaceId: string,
1794:   deploymentId: string,
1795:   maxCycles = 8
1796: ): Promise<void> {
1797:   async function reconcileInlineCancelRequestedRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
1798:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1799:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running' || !latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
1800:       return false;
1801:     }
1802: 
1803:     if (!latest.providerDeploymentId) {
1804:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested_inline');
1805:       return true;
1806:     }
1807: 
1808:     try {
1809:       const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1810:       const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
1811:       const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
1812:       const providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(latest.providerDeploymentId);
1813: 
1814:       if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1815:         await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'provider_cancelled');
1816:         return true;
1817:       }
1818: 
1819:       if (providerStatus.status === 'succeeded') {
1820:         const deployedUrl = providerStatus.deployedUrl ?? latest.deployedUrl ?? null;
1821:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'succeeded', {
1822:           workspaceId,
1823:           deployedUrl,
1824:           providerDeploymentId: latest.providerDeploymentId,
1825:           errorCode: null,
1826:           errorMessage: null,
1827:         });
1828:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1829:           workspaceId,
1830:           deploymentId,
1831:           eventType: 'deployment_succeeded',
1832:           payload: {
1833:             deployedUrl,
1834:             reconciled: true,
1835:             fromInlineCancelRequested: true,
1836:           },
1837:         });
1838:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1839:           deploymentId,
1840:           status: 'succeeded',
1841:           deployedUrl,
1842:           errorCode: null,
1843:           errorMessage: null,
1844:         });
1845:         return true;
1846:       }
1847: 
1848:       if (providerStatus.status === 'failed') {
1849:         const errorCode = providerStatus.errorCode ?? 'provider_deploy_failed';
1850:         const errorMessage = providerStatus.errorMessage ?? 'Provider deployment failed';
1851:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1852:           workspaceId,
1853:           errorCode,
1854:           errorMessage,
1855:         });
1856:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1857:           workspaceId,
1858:           deploymentId,
1859:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1860:           payload: { code: errorCode, message: errorMessage },
1861:         });
1862:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1863:           deploymentId,
1864:           status: 'failed',
1865:           errorCode,
1866:           errorMessage,
1867:         });
1868:         return true;
1869:       }
1870:     } catch {
1871:       // Best-effort inline reconciliation only.
1872:     }
1873: 
1874:     return false;
1875:   }
1876: 
1877:   async function recoverInlineRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
1878:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1879:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running') {
1880:       return false;
1881:     }
1882: 
1883:     if (latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
1884:       return false;
1885:     }
1886: 
1887:     if (latest.attemptCount > latest.maxRetries) {
1888:       return false;
1889:     }
1890: 
1891:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
1892:       workspaceId,
1893:       startedAt: null,
1894:       finishedAt: null,
1895:       errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
1896:       errorMessage: 'Recovered inline deployment retry after transient failure',
1897:     });
1898:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1899:       workspaceId,
1900:       deploymentId,
1901:       eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',

1903:     });

1905:   }
1906: 
1907:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
1908:     let retryableErrorRaised = false;

1910:       await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1911:     } catch (error) {

1916:         }
1917: 
1918:         const reconciled = await reconcileInlineCancelRequestedRunningDeployment();
1919:         if (!reconciled) {
1920:           await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
1921:             workspaceId,
1922:             startedAt: null,
1923:             finishedAt: null,
1924:             errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
1925:             errorMessage: 'Inline cancel reconciliation deferred; retry scheduled',
1926:           });
1927:           await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1928:             workspaceId,
1929:             deploymentId,
1930:             eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
1931:             payload: {
1932:               attemptCount: null,
1933:               maxRetries: null,
1934:               inlineCancelReconcileDeferred: true,
1935:             },
1936:           });
1937:         }
1938:         return;
1939:       }
1940: 
1941:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /already running; defer redelivery/i.test(error.message)) {
1942:         return;
1943:       }
1944: 
1945:       if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error)) {
1946:         retryableErrorRaised = true;
1947:         try {
1948:           const recovered = await recoverInlineRunningDeployment();
1949:           if (recovered) {

1951:           }
1952:         } catch {
1953:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
1954:         }
1955:       }
1956:     }
1957: 
1958:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1959:     if (!latest) {
1960:       return;
1961:     }
1962:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {
1963:       return;
1964:     }
1965:     if (retryableErrorRaised) {

1967:     }

653: /**
654:  * Append a sequenced job event and return its sequence number.
655:  */
656: export async function appendJobEvent(
657:   db: D1Database,
658:   input: {
659:     jobId: string;
660:     attemptNo?: number;
661:     eventType: string;
662:     phase: JobPhase;
663:     payload: unknown;
664:   }
665: ): Promise<number> {
666:   const sequenceResult = await db
667:     .prepare('UPDATE jobs SET last_event_seq = last_event_seq + 1 WHERE id = ? RETURNING last_event_seq')
668:     .bind(input.jobId)
669:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
670: 
671:   if (!sequenceResult) {
672:     throw new Error(`Failed to allocate event sequence for job ${input.jobId}`);
673:   }
674: 
675:   const seq = Number(sequenceResult.last_event_seq);
676:   await db
677:     .prepare(
678:       `INSERT INTO job_events (job_id, attempt_no, seq, event_type, phase, payload_json)
679:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
680:     )
681:     .bind(
682:       input.jobId,
683:       input.attemptNo ?? 0,
684:       seq,
685:       input.eventType,
686:       input.phase,
687:       JSON.stringify(input.payload)
688:     )
689:     .run();
690: 
691:   return seq;
692: }

701:   limit = 500
702: ): Promise<JobEventItem[]> {

704:     .prepare(
705:       `SELECT id, job_id, attempt_no, seq, event_type, phase, payload_json, created_at
706:        FROM job_events
707:        WHERE job_id = ? AND seq > ?
708:        ORDER BY seq ASC
709:        LIMIT ?`
710:     )
711:     .bind(jobId, fromExclusive, limit)
712:     .all<JobEventRecord>();
713: 
714:   return result.results.map((row) => {
715:     let payload: unknown;
716:     try {
717:       payload = JSON.parse(row.payload_json);
718:     } catch {
719:       payload = { raw: row.payload_json };
720:     }
721: 
722:     return {
723:       seq: row.seq,
724:       eventType: row.event_type,
725:       phase: row.phase,
726:       payload,
727:       createdAt: row.created_at,
728:     };
729:   });
730: }

1116: export async function createWorkspaceOperation(
1117:   db: D1Database,
1118:   input: CreateWorkspaceOperationInput
1119: ): Promise<{ operation: WorkspaceOperationResponse; reused: boolean }> {
1120:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
1121:   const existingIdempotency = await db
1122:     .prepare(
1123:       `SELECT operation_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1124:        FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1125:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1126:        LIMIT 1`
1127:     )
1128:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1129:     .first<{ operation_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1130: 
1131:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
1132:     if (existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1133:       throw new WorkspaceIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey, input.type);
1134:     }
1135: 
1136:     const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, existingIdempotency.operation_id);
1137:     if (!existingOperation) {
1138:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing operation ${existingIdempotency.operation_id}`);
1139:     }
1140:     return { operation: existingOperation, reused: true };
1141:   }
1142: 
1143:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1144:     await db
1145:       .prepare(
1146:         `DELETE FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1147:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?`
1148:       )
1149:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1150:       .run();
1151:   }
1152: 
1153:   const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
1154:   const operationId = input.id;
1155: 
1156:   const operationRecord = await db
1157:     .prepare(
1158:       `INSERT INTO workspace_operations (
1159:          id,
1160:          workspace_id,
1161:          type,
1162:          status,
1163:          actor_id,
1164:          auth_principal_json,
1165:          request_payload_json,
1166:          request_payload_sha256,
1167:          idempotency_key,
1168:          warnings_json
1169:        )
1170:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, '[]')
1171:        RETURNING *`
1172:     )
1173:     .bind(
1174:       operationId,
1175:       input.workspaceId,
1176:       input.type,
1177:       input.actorId ?? null,
1178:       JSON.stringify(input.authPrincipal ?? {}),
1179:       JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),
1180:       input.requestPayloadSha256,
1181:       input.idempotencyKey
1182:     )
1183:     .first<WorkspaceOperationRecord>();
1184: 
1185:   if (!operationRecord) {
1186:     throw new Error('Failed to create workspace operation');
1187:   }
1188: 
1189:   try {
1190:     await db
1191:       .prepare(
1192:         `INSERT INTO workspace_operation_idempotency (
1193:            id,
1194:            workspace_id,
1195:            operation_type,
1196:            idempotency_key,
1197:            operation_id,
1198:            request_payload_sha256,
1199:            expires_at
1200:          )
1201:          VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
1202:       )
1203:       .bind(
1204:         generatePrefixedId('wopk'),
1205:         input.workspaceId,
1206:         input.type,
1207:         input.idempotencyKey,
1208:         operationId,
1209:         input.requestPayloadSha256,
1210:         expiresAt
1211:       )
1212:       .run();
1213:   } catch (error) {
1214:     if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
1215:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1216:       throw error;
1217:     }
1218: 
1219:     const concurrentIdempotency = await db
1220:       .prepare(
1221:         `SELECT operation_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1222:          FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1223:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1224:          LIMIT 1`
1225:       )
1226:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1227:       .first<{ operation_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1228: 
1229:     if (!concurrentIdempotency || concurrentIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1230:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1231:       throw new Error('Idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
1232:     }
1233:     if (concurrentIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1234:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1235:       throw new WorkspaceIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey, input.type);
1236:     }
1237: 
1238:     const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, concurrentIdempotency.operation_id);
1239:     if (!existingOperation) {
1240:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1241:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing operation ${concurrentIdempotency.operation_id}`);
1242:     }
1243:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1244:     return { operation: existingOperation, reused: true };
1245:   }
1246: 
1247:   return { operation: toWorkspaceOperationResponse(operationRecord), reused: false };
1248: }

1287: export async function updateWorkspaceOperationStatus(
1288:   db: D1Database,
1289:   operationId: string,
1290:   status: WorkspaceOperationStatus,
1291:   options?: {
1292:     result?: unknown;
1293:     warnings?: unknown[];
1294:     errorCode?: string | null;
1295:     errorClass?: string | null;
1296:     errorMessage?: string | null;
1297:     errorDetails?: unknown;
1298:     startedAt?: string | null;
1299:     finishedAt?: string | null;
1300:   }
1301: ): Promise<void> {
1302:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
1303:   const values: Array<string | number | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
1304: 
1305:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
1306:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
1307:     values.push(options.startedAt);
1308:   }
1309:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
1310:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
1311:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
1312:   }
1313:   if (options?.result !== undefined) {
1314:     updates.push('result_json = ?');
1315:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
1316:   }
1317:   if (options?.warnings !== undefined) {
1318:     updates.push('warnings_json = ?');
1319:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.warnings));
1320:   }
1321:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
1322:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
1323:     values.push(options.errorCode);
1324:   }
1325:   if (options?.errorClass !== undefined) {
1326:     updates.push('error_class = ?');
1327:     values.push(options.errorClass);
1328:   }
1329:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
1330:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
1331:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
1332:   }
1333:   if (options?.errorDetails !== undefined) {
1334:     updates.push('error_details_json = ?');
1335:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.errorDetails));
1336:   }
1337:   if (status === 'running') {
1338:     updates.push('started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?)');
1339:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
1340:   }
1341:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed') {
1342:     updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
1343:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
1344:     updates.push('duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL OR COALESCE(finished_at, ?) IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(COALESCE(finished_at, ?)) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END');
1345:     const finishedAtForDuration = new Date().toISOString();
1346:     values.push(finishedAtForDuration, finishedAtForDuration);
1347:   }
1348: 
1349:   values.push(operationId);
1350: 
1351:   await db
1352:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_operations SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`)
1353:     .bind(...values)
1354:     .run();
1355: }

No blocking issues found for the stickiness fix.

- I verified `cancel_requested_at` is no longer implicitly touched on success updates: `updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus` only writes it when `options.cancelRequestedAt` is explicitly provided (`packages/worker/src/lib/db.ts:2182`), and the cancel-rejected/success-reconciliation paths do not pass that option.
- In the cancel rejected during polling path, the fallback success write preserves cancel intent (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1295`).
- In follow-on reconciliation paths (`running + cancelRequestedAt + provider succeeded`), success updates also preserve cancel intent (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1550` and `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1821`).
- The targeted regression coverage is present and assertions check stickiness after success (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.test.ts:947`, `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.test.ts:949`).
- Full worker test suite passes, including `workspace-deployment-runner`.
